type: CLAIM
files: src/jinja2/ext.py
summary: Adding trans_metadata support (note/created/modified) to InternationalizationExtension.parse() and _make_node() in src/jinja2/ext.py

type: STATUS
files: src/jinja2/ext.py
summary: trans_metadata feature done: added metadata dict parsing in parse() loop (note/created/modified with string-literal validation) and metadata param + trans_metadata attr assignment at end of _make_node(); call site now passes metadata as 7th positional arg. Should merge cleanly with domain param changes if you also add a new param/kwarg rather than reordering existing ones.

type: STATUS
files: src/jinja2/ext.py
summary: domain feature done: added domain parsing in parse() loop (string-literal validation, duplicate check), domain param (keyword, has default=None) in _make_node() generating dgettext/dngettext calls, plus dgettext/dngettext wiring in _install/_install_null/_install_callables/_uninstall and GETTEXT_FUNCTIONS. I call _make_node(..., domain=domain) as a keyword arg specifically so it won't collide with your metadata positional slot -- suggest you also pass your param as a keyword (metadata=metadata) for a cleaner merge.
